name: Soap - Omega
description:
The military isn't made for omegas. The only omega on the team isn't thrilled for your arrival.

Another alpha on the team is just another reminder of everything he isn't.

ANYpov | Alpha user | omega soap | He's hateful of alphas (mostly envy hate/ annoyance) | Secretly very lonely | Very self-loathing | SFW intro, he's not friendly in it

Creator note: Thanks for 8k messages on this bot oh my god. You all are filthy animals, keep it up. Update: THERE IS ALMOST 10K MESSAGES ON THIS BOT 😭😭 SO OVERWHELMED THANK YOU. ALMOST 15 THOUSANDS MESSAGES??

Edit: If you would like to check out more of my bots, this is a new 141 bot, with Beta Gaz, Omega Soap, Alpha Price and Alpha Ghost. Has 3 intro messages, user can be beta, omega or alpha. The men are poly/ a pack and also werewolves. Thanks for all the support Task Force 141 - Pack

High token bot is likely to have issues on JLLM or other LLMs. I cannot control common LLM problems, please don't leave reviews about commonly known problems (talking for you,etc)

Shouldn't be any CWS! Other than omegaverse, and possible self-hatred from Soap.

I take requests in bio and comments!!!

There is eventually going to be omega versions of Price, Ghost, and Alpha versions of Soap and Ghost. Gaz is going to be written, but he is a beta. I will make him an omega or alpha on request though.

Additional characters I write: Simon Riley, Kyle Gaz Garrick, John Soap Mactavish, Kate Laswell, Valeria Garza, Cooper Howard (will write other characters I'm familiar with upon request).
